consumable_item.description: A canister of engineered phages tuned to the cross-timeline Grey Goo. Deploy it onto an infected building to dissolve the swarm there completely.
consumable_item.strategy_tip: Select the infected buildings (highlighted) and right-click one within range to purge it. Move your unit to reach distant infections.

consumable_item.description: A canister of engineered phages tuned to your own bounded Grey Goo. Deploy it onto one of your units to dissolve every stack of goo eating it - useful when a subverted unit arrives still carrying its own saturation, or when your payloads find their way home.
consumable_item.strategy_tip: Right-click one of your own units within range to purge all Grey Goo stacks from it.
